title: ABBA Python Headless Mode Operation
description: Key facts regarding the support and operation of the ABBA Python package in headless mode, which is critical for scripted and automated brain image registration workflows.

key_value_pairs.fact_1: The ABBA Python package fully supports and operates correctly in headless mode.
key_value_pairs.fact_2: Headless mode is enabled by passing the 'headless=True' argument during the instantiation of the Abba class.
key_value_pairs.fact_3: Correct initialization and operation in headless mode are confirmed.
key_value_pairs.fact_4: Headless operation is the standard method for using ABBA Python in automated scripts or on servers without a graphical user interface.
